title: carex paniculata subsp. lusitanica
intro: Carex paniculata subsp. lusitanica, also known as the Lusitanian panicle sedge, is a subspecies of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits associated with Carex paniculata subsp. lusitanica include treating urinary tract infections, reducing inflammation, and aiding in digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
